scripts.install:all: npm --prefix gallery-app install && npm --prefix photo-list-app install && npm --prefix photo-viewer-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix gallery-app start" "npm --prefix photo-list-app start" "npm --prefix photo-viewer-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix gallery-app run build" "npm --prefix photo-list-app run build" "npm --prefix photo-viewer-app run build"
